name: Pizza Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the tomato sauce, onions, and seasonings into the meat. The mixture will be thick.
2. Cook over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Place biscuits in a greased muffin tin, pressing to cover the bottom and sides.
4. Spoon about 1/4 cup of the mixture into biscuit-lined cups and sprinkle with cheese.
5. Bake at 400°F for 12 minutes or until golden brown.
